🔧 Bengkil Lah

The Smarter Way
to Service Your Car

A two-sided marketplace connecting car owners with trusted workshops — bookings, payments, and real-time updates in one app.

Mobile App SaaS Platform Malaysia Market Series A Ready
The Problem

Car Servicing is Broken

😤

No Transparency

Customers don't know what work was done, what parts were used, or if they were overcharged.

📞

Friction-Heavy Booking

Phone calls, waiting, no confirmation — most workshops still operate with pen and paper.

🔍

Discovery is Broken

Finding a trusted mechanic relies on word-of-mouth. No ratings, no reviews, no accountability.

📊

Workshops Left Behind

Small workshops have no digital tools to manage bookings, inventory, or customer relationships.

5.7 million registered vehicles in Malaysia with no dominant digital platform for servicing.

The Solution

One Platform. Two Powerful Apps.

👤

Customer App

1

Discover

Browse nearby workshops by rating, price & specialty

2

Book & Pay

Select service, choose vehicle, pay securely in-app

3

Track & Review

Live updates, chat with mechanic, view service report

🔧

Workshop Vendor App

1

Manage Bookings

Accept/reject, assign bays, track real-time status

2

Service Reports

Log work done, products used, upload photos

3

Inventory & Revenue

Track parts stock, monitor earnings, view reviews

Product Highlights

50+ Features. All Shipped.

📍

Smart Discovery

Geospatial search with filters, price comparison across workshops, real-time queue wait times, and flash deal badges.

📆

Booking & Payments

Multi-service booking, vehicle history pre-fill, Stripe in-app payment, PDF invoice download, and one-tap reschedule.

🎁

Loyalty & Referrals

Earn 1 point per RM1 spent. 100 pts = RM1 discount. Referral codes give both parties rewards — built-in growth loop.

📊

Vendor Analytics Suite

Monthly revenue bars, peak-hour heatmap, top services, repeat vs new customer split — full CRM with spend history.

📋

Transparent Service Reports

Per-service work logs, parts used, mechanic assigned, completion notes — plus inventory auto-deduction and reorder alerts.

🏢

Corporate & Insurance

Fleet vehicle management, corporate billing accounts, and end-to-end insurance claim tracking for panel workshops.

Why Now?

✓

Post-COVID digital adoption

Malaysians now expect app-based convenience for every service.

✓

No dominant player

No Grab/Airbnb equivalent exists for car servicing in Southeast Asia.

✓

Workshops need digitisation

Government SME digital push creates urgent demand for vendor tools.

✓

Recurring revenue model

Cars need servicing every 3–12 months — built-in repeat usage.

Business Model

Multiple Revenue Streams

Transaction Commission

% fee on every completed booking via platform

5–8%
Workshop SaaS Subscription

Monthly fee for inventory, reporting & analytics tools

RM 99/mo
Premium Listing

Boosted placement in search & discovery for workshops

RM 199/mo
Payment Processing Spread

Margin on in-app Stripe payment processing

0.5%

Unit Economics

Avg. booking value
RM 180
Platform take
RM 12.60

commission revenue alone
Technology

Built to Scale from Day One

Stack

📱 React Native + Expo — iOS, Android & Web from one codebase
⚡ FastAPI (Python) — async, high-performance REST API
🗄️ MongoDB — flexible document store, scales horizontally
🔌 Socket.IO — real-time chat & live notifications
💳 Stripe — secure in-app payment processing
🔐 JWT Auth — stateless, role-based (customer / vendor)

Architecture Advantages

✓

Cross-Platform

Single codebase ships to iOS, Android and web simultaneously.

✓

Real-time First

Socket.IO handles live booking updates, chat, and online presence indicators.

✓

Modular Microservices Ready

Routers are independently deployable — easy to extract into microservices.

✓

Working MVP

Fully functional app with seeded data, real payments, and live chat today.
